typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varEndYear as integer (),
	varOTables as string (),
	varStartYear as integer (),
	var_batches as string (),
	var_batch_nbr as integer (),
	var_log_path as string (),
	var_fzg_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fn_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_ln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	Var_log_path as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT tpms.row_id,        tpms.hosp_patient_nbr,        tpms.phn,        tpms.phn_clean,        tpms.name_first_middle,        tpms.name_first_middle_clean,        tpms.first_name_score,        tpms.name_first,        tpms.name_last,        tpms.name_last_clean,        tpms.last_name_score,        tpms.birth_date,        tpms.gender,        tpms.match_code,        tpms.aka_name,        tpms.row_score,        tpms.dupe_count,        tpms.julian_month,        tpms.patient_nbr,        tpms.street_addr1,        tpms.street_addr2,        tpms.city,        tpms.province,        tpms.postal_code,        tpms.phone_number,        tpms.data_source,        tpms.stage_id FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_master_stg1] tpms WHERE  tpms.phn_clean IS NULL        AND tpms.match_code IN (\'C\');',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> srcptmasterstg1c
srcptmasterstg1c sink(input(
		last_name_score as integer,
		match_code as string,
		gender as string,
		city as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		julian_month as short,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		name_last as string,
		name_first_middle_clean as string,
		aka_name as string,
		province as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		patient_nbr as integer,
		name_first as string,
		name_last_clean as string,
		stage_id as integer,
		first_name_score as integer,
		row_score as integer,
		data_source as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		phn as string,
		phone_number as string,
		row_id as string,
		postal_code as string,
		name_first_middle as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		last_name_score,
		match_code,
		gender,
		city,
		dupe_count,
		birth_date,
		julian_month,
		street_addr1,
		street_addr2,
		name_last,
		name_first_middle_clean,
		aka_name,
		province,
		phn_clean,
		patient_nbr,
		name_first,
		name_last_clean,
		stage_id,
		first_name_score,
		row_score,
		data_source,
		hosp_patient_nbr,
		phn,
		phone_number,
		row_id,
		postal_code,
		name_first_middle)) ~> destptstg2
